content_body:
The goal was to escape the busy hustle and bustle of our normal lives and to create in some fresh air. MISSION ACCOMPLISHED!

First time staying in the North GA Mountains and we cannot wait to return. The cabin was a very nice home base. The fire table in the screened porch was perfect.

Like I said, never saw a sunrise because of the fog, but that was OK. The groundhogs and deer made up for it! 
We hiked the two waterfall hikes recommended, and they were perfect - especially for carrying around our 1-year old son.  It was a wonderful way to help celebrate my wife’s birthday week and see peak leaf change! Thanks ~ GA
title: The Perfect Escape from The Busy Hustle and Bustle!
